flow-loss-funnel-desc: Retention and loss across key journey stages, helping identify critical drop-off points.
platform-loss-desc: Early loss and loading performance across platforms to guide performance optimization.
channel-attrition-desc: Early loss and dwell behavior of each traffic channel to optimize acquisition strategy.
high-bounce-pages-desc: Pages with highest loss rate and their main traffic sources for quick issue locating.
site-interaction-trend-desc: Overall interaction is steadily increasing; like rate (1.2%) and lead rate (0.25%) both improved DoD.
platform-interaction-desc: APP shows the most active behavior with higher registration (1.5%) and retention (0.45%) than H5.
module-interaction-desc: New Car module has the highest retention volume (0.45%), while Content has strong engagement but weak conversion.
total-conversion-funnel-desc: From entry traffic to final leads, overall conversion rate is around 0.8%, indicating optimization potential in mid-funnel steps.
platform-conversion-efficiency-desc: The conversion rate on the APP side is extremely high, and there is serious loss on the H5 side. It is recommended to add guidance on “downloading the APP to view complete information” on the H5 side
user-tiered-asset-insight: Certified user growth slowed (-0.5% MoM), mainly due to fluctuations in the pass rate of the new real-name authentication process, requiring optimization of the upload interface.
regional-traffic-insight: KSA region's traffic share has reached 31.5%, with daily new additions surpassing UAE, becoming the primary growth engine.
user-segmentation-insight: Car viewing audience (information + video) has the largest traffic base and is an important traffic entry point. Car buying audience (new cars + used cars) accounts for 30%, but has the highest commercial conversion value.
conversion-analysis-desc: Overall conversion funnel and cross-channel conversion path comparison
conversion-analysis-insight: The overall conversion rate from the inbound to the final lead is 0.8%. The bottleneck: Effective browsing → Login Sign-up links are lost the most.
核心指标：人均PV/点赞/评论/注册量及率/留资数及率: Core indicators: Per capita page views/likes/comments/registration volume and rate/number and rate of retained information
Tips：数据统计时间为T-1的数据，每天上午8点拉取前一天的最新数据: Tips: The data with statistical time of T-1 is retrieved at 8: 00 a.m. every day, and the latest data of the previous day is retrieved.
UV：在指定时间段内，产生page_view事件后按照user id去重后统计得: UV: the total number of users in a specified period of time after generating the page_view event according to the user id.
留存：某一时间点的新用户，在后续指定时间窗口内再次产生有效访问行为的比例。: Retention: the proportion of new users at a certain point in time who have effective access behavior again within the subsequent specified time window.
留存率 =（窗口期内回访的新用户数 / 首次访问日（T 日）的总新用户数）× 1: Retention rate = (number of new users who return during the window period/total number of new users on the first visit day (T day)) × 100%
次日留存：T 日（首次访问日）的新用户，在 T+1 日（次日）至少有 1 次访问: Retain the next day: the proportion of new users on T day (the first visit day) who visit at least once on T+1 day (the next day).
7 日留存：T 日的新用户，在 T+7 日（首次访问后的第 7 天）至少有 1: 7-day retention: the proportion of new users on T-day who visit at least once on T+7 (the 7th day after the first visit).
30 日留存：T 日新用户，在 T+30 日 至少有 1 次访问的比例。: 30-day retention: the proportion of new users who visit at least once on T+30.
人均 PV：在指定时间段内，用户平均浏览的页面数。: Per capita PV: the average number of pages viewed by users in a specified period of time.
人均 PV = 总 PV 数 / 总 UV 数。: Per capita PV = total PV number/total UV number.
平均会话时长：当前统计为用户的平均会话时长。: Average Session Duration: currently counted as the average session duration of users.
平均会话时长 = AVG（用户离开平台的时间 − 用户进入平台的时间）。: Average session duration = AVG (time when users leave the platform and time when users enter the platform).
取用户进入平台的时间戳、用户离开平台的时间戳来算差值后，再求平均值。: Take the time stamp of the user entering the platform and the time stamp of the user leaving the platform to calculate the difference, and then calculate the average.
新增用户数：在指定时间段内，新增用户数量。: Number of new users: the number of new users in a specified period of time.
注册数：在指定时间段内，成功注册用户总数。: Number of registrations: the total number of users successfully registered within a specified period of time.
注册率：计算口径 = 注册用户数 / 总 UV × 100%。: Registration rate: calculation caliber = number of registered users/total UV × 100%.
跳出率：其定义为只访问了 1 个页面就离开的会话数，占总会话数的百分比。: Bounce rate: it is defined as the number of sessions that leave after visiting only one page, accounting for the percentage of the total sessions.
跳出率 = 单个页面会话数 / 总会话数 × 100%。: Bounce rate = number of sessions per page/total sessions × 100%.
表单线索数：即在指定时间段内，成功提交留资表单的数量。: Number of form clues: that is, the number of retention forms successfully submitted within a specified time period.
表单提交数事件分为两层：先通过【go_click】行为打开表单，再通过【butt: The event of form submission number is divided into two layers: first, the form is opened by [go_click], and then the number of form submissions is counted by [button_click] and [content_type=Submit_Success].
有效浏览 UV：在指定时间段内，用户产生的会话时长大于 3s。: Effective browsing of UV: within a specified time period, the session duration generated by users is more than 3s.
用户进入页面，产生page_view事件后，会话时长时候>=3s: After the user enters the page and generates the page_view event, the session duration is > =3s.
有效浏览占比：计算口径 = 有效浏览 UV / 总 UV × 100%。: Effective browsing ratio: calculation aperture = effective browsing UV/total UV × 100%.
环比：所选时间范围内的数据与上一个时间周期的数据的增长对比。: Ring comparison: the growth comparison between the data in the selected time range and the data in the previous time period.
环比增长率 = （本期数值 − 上期数值） / 上期数值 × 100%。: Chain growth rate = (current value and previous value)/previous value × 100%.
同比：所选时间范围内的数据与去年同时间周期的数据的增长对比。: Year-on-year: the growth of data in the selected time range is compared with that in the same time period last year.
同比增长率 = （本期数值 − 去年同期数值） / 去年同期数值 × 100%。: Year-on-year growth rate = (value of current period and value of the same period last year)/value of the same period last year × 100%.
存量池监控：注册、认证及车主用户的区域分布与健康度。: Stock pool monitoring: registration, certification, regional distribution and health of owners and users.
核心指标：UV/有效浏览UV/留存率(1/7/30日)。: Core indicator: UV/ effective browsing UV/ retention rate (1/7/30).
环比: compare the numbers with the prior period of the same length
同比: compare to the same period of the previous year
全站→分端→渠道→页面，精准定位流失根源。: The whole station → sub-end → channel → page, and accurately locate the source of loss.
